channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: ASML has room to raise prices, CFO says reut.rs/4wLTtfa
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 当社グループでのシステム障害発生について（第2報） | 株式会社ニチレイ 2026年7月15日 各…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
当社グループでのシステム障害発生について（第2報） | 株式会社ニチレイ

2026年7月15日 各位 株式会社ニチレイ 当社グループでのシステム障害発生について（第2報） 株式会社ニチレイ（本社：東京都中央区、代表取締役社長(CEO)：嶋本和訓）が、2026年7月13日付で公表しました、「当社グループでのシステム障害発生について」（第1報）に関して、調査で判明した内容および今後の対応について、...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
当社グループでのシステム障害発生について（第2報） | 株式会社ニチレイ

2026年7月15日 各位 株式会社ニチレイ 当社グループでのシステム障害発生について（第2報） 株式会社ニチレイ（本社：東京都中央区、代表取締役社長(CEO)：嶋本和訓）が、2026年7月13日付で公表しました、「当社グループでのシステム障害発生について」（第1報）に関して、調査で判明した内容および今後の対応について、...

item.title: UK police charge 14-year-old boy with terrorism offence over…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)

item.title: Nevada’s governor was pulled over by a Las Vegas police offi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Nevada’s governor was pulled over by a Las Vegas police officer in May for allegedly failing to stop at a red light before making a right turn in his pickup truck. He wasn’t ticketed after identifying himself.
item.content:encoded: Nevada’s governor was pulled over by a Las Vegas police officer in May for allegedly failing to stop at a red light before making a right turn in his pickup truck. He wasn’t ticketed after identifying himself.

item.title: Temperatures in California will be some of the hottest tempe…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Temperatures in California will be some of the hottest temperatures of the year this week, prompting heat advisories and dire warnings about the increased risk of wildfires on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Temperatures in California will be some of the hottest temperatures of the year this week, prompting heat advisories and dire warnings about the increased risk of wildfires on Wednesday.

item.title: The Odyssey review – Nolan goes god-tier with breathtaking e…

item.content:encoded: The Odyssey review – Nolan goes god-tier with breathtaking epic of men, monsters and moral metamorphosis

item.title: The US and Iran continue to launch strikes despite their mem…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The US and Iran continue to launch strikes despite their memorandum of understanding. It comes as the US reinstates its naval blockade and as President Donald Trump threatens to bomb Iranian power plants and bridges unless Tehran returns to the negotiating table. https://cnn.it/4wHsh0Z
item.content:encoded: The US and Iran continue to launch strikes despite their memorandum of understanding. It comes as the US reinstates its naval blockade and as President Donald Trump threatens to bomb Iranian power plants and bridges unless Tehran returns to the negotiating table. https://cnn.it/4wHsh0Z

item.title: Kevin Warsh said Trump — who’s long called for slashing US i…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Kevin Warsh said Trump — who’s long called for slashing US interest rates — hasn’t tried to interfere with the central bank, and wouldn’t succeed if he attempted
item.content:encoded: Kevin Warsh said Trump — who’s long called for slashing US interest rates — hasn’t tried to interfere with the central bank, and wouldn’t succeed if he attempted

item.title: #🔖暮らし 突っ張り棒と棚板でぬいぐるみ収納！ カーテンレール上のデッドスペースに居場所をつくろう - ソレドコ 部…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
突っ張り棒と棚板でぬいぐるみ収納！ カーテンレール上のデッドスペースに居場所をつくろう - ソレドコ

部屋の断捨離や模様替えを進める中でぶち当たった「ぬいぐるみ収納問題」を突っ張り棒で解決します。カーテンレール上のデッドスペースを活用し、浮かせる収納で10体もの居場所を確保。設置方法や収納のコツをレビューします。 最近部屋の掃除にハマっておりまして。 いわゆる断捨離だったり模様替えだったりを楽しく進...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
突っ張り棒と棚板でぬいぐるみ収納！ カーテンレール上のデッドスペースに居場所をつくろう - ソレドコ

部屋の断捨離や模様替えを進める中でぶち当たった「ぬいぐるみ収納問題」を突っ張り棒で解決します。カーテンレール上のデッドスペースを活用し、浮かせる収納で10体もの居場所を確保。設置方法や収納のコツをレビューします。 最近部屋の掃除にハマっておりまして。 いわゆる断捨離だったり模様替えだったりを楽しく進...

item.title: As many as 400 Native groups across the U.S. remain outside …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: As many as 400 Native groups across the U.S. remain outside of the federal recognition system, which can confer health care, education, housing and casino rights. For smaller tribes like many in the Pacific Northwest, recognition takes political muscle they don’t have.
item.content:encoded: As many as 400 Native groups across the U.S. remain outside of the federal recognition system, which can confer health care, education, housing and casino rights. For smaller tribes like many in the Pacific Northwest, recognition takes political muscle they don’t have.

item.title: Ethics disclosures show 7 out of 10 FCC commissioners since …
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Ethics disclosures show 7 out of 10 FCC commissioners since 2016 have accepted Kennedy Center tickets worth thousands courtesy of CBS or its parent company (Corey G. Johnson/ProPublica)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Ethics disclosures show 7 out of 10 FCC commissioners since 2016 have accepted Kennedy Center tickets worth thousands courtesy of CBS or its parent company (Corey G. Johnson/ProPublica)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: A man is arrested in Utah for stabbing a Muslim man multiple…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A man is arrested in Utah for stabbing a Muslim man multiple times and stating that he targeted the victim because of the victim’s religion, police say in court records.
item.content:encoded: A man is arrested in Utah for stabbing a Muslim man multiple times and stating that he targeted the victim because of the victim’s religion, police say in court records.

item.title: Trump administration officials are advancing plans to extend…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Trump administration officials are advancing plans to extend a shipping waiver that’s made it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US, as the renewed war in Iran raises the prospect of prolonged supply disruptions.
item.content:encoded: Trump administration officials are advancing plans to extend a shipping waiver that’s made it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US, as the renewed war in Iran raises the prospect of prolonged supply disruptions.

item.title: England are set to play arch rival Argentina in Atlanta, but…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: England are set to play arch rival Argentina in Atlanta, but back home fans will flock to pubs across the country hoping to see their team make its first World Cup final in 60 years.
item.content:encoded: England are set to play arch rival Argentina in Atlanta, but back home fans will flock to pubs across the country hoping to see their team make its first World Cup final in 60 years.

item.title: Scott Bryce, a prolific actor best known for playing the cha…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Scott Bryce, a prolific actor best known for playing the charming and cunning antihero Craig Montgomery on the CBS daytime drama “As the World Turns,” died on Sunday at 68.
item.content:encoded: Scott Bryce, a prolific actor best known for playing the charming and cunning antihero Craig Montgomery on the CBS daytime drama “As the World Turns,” died on Sunday at 68.

item.title: #🔖暮らし 1食わずか29円！ フライパンで作れる簡単ピザ - 東雲製作所 （本記事は自著の宣伝を含みます。） 「究…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
1食わずか29円！ フライパンで作れる簡単ピザ - 東雲製作所

（本記事は自著の宣伝を含みます。） 「究極の節約レシピ本を出版しました。」には沢山のブクマ、スター、アクセスを頂きどうも有難うございました。 shinonomen.hatenablog.com 特に、お買い上げ頂いた方、お読み頂いた方には厚く御礼申し上げます。 前の記事でレシピが異様に安いことは伝わったと思うが、安かろう不味...
item.content:encoded:

1食わずか29円！ フライパンで作れる簡単ピザ - 東雲製作所

item.title: Analysis: Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating th…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Analysis: Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating the United States’ twice-yearly ritual of changing the clocks by an hour — this time, by making Daylight Saving Time permanent. https://cnn.it/4vyjihJ
item.content:encoded: Analysis: Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating the United States’ twice-yearly ritual of changing the clocks by an hour — this time, by making Daylight Saving Time permanent. https://cnn.it/4vyjihJ

item.content:encoded:

item.title: The latest airline upgrade isn’t an in-flight bed, five-star…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description:
The latest airline upgrade isn’t an in-flight bed, five-star meals or a craft cocktail.

It’s the promise that the seat beside you stays empty.
item.content:encoded:
The latest airline upgrade isn’t an in-flight bed, five-star meals or a craft cocktail.

It’s the promise that the seat beside you stays empty.

item.title: Former President Joe Biden has written a memoir that will be…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Former President Joe Biden has written a memoir that will be released two weeks after the midterm elections this fall, he said. “Promise Me, America” would cover Ukraine and “restoring our democracy” after the Jan. 6 attack by President Trump’s supporters and more.
item.content:encoded: Former President Joe Biden has written a memoir that will be released two weeks after the midterm elections this fall, he said. “Promise Me, America” would cover Ukraine and “restoring our democracy” after the Jan. 6 attack by President Trump’s supporters and more.
